member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.INotification
member.summary: Marker interface to represent a notification.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequest
member.summary: Defines a marker interface to represent a request with a void response.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IRequest`1
member.summary: Defines a marker interface to represent a request with a response.

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.IStreamRequest`1
member.summary: Marker interface for a streaming request.
member.typeparam: The type of each streamed item

member.name: T:SwiftMediator.Core.Unit
member.summary: Represents a unit of execution that returns no value.
